Scalded Rat Skin  
 

No Trade Quest Item
WT: 0.3 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Scalded Rat Skin
No Trade Quest Item
WT: 0.3 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Type:Combinable
Stackable:20
Submitted By:iventheassassin
Lucy Entry By:unknown
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-08 03:23:11
Page Updated:Sat Nov 15th, 2025

Expansion: Gates of Discord
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 1
[Drops | Quests | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Blackburrow
NPC Name
a giant plague rat

Dagnor's Cauldron
NPC Name
a cauldron rat
a scalded rat

Misty Thicket
NPC Name
a diseased rat - Misty Thicket
a giant thicket rat
a large thicket rat

North Kaladim
NPC Name
Infected Rat

North Qeynos
NPC Name
a sewer rat - North Qeynos

North Ro
NPC Name
a large rat - North Ro

Paineel
NPC Name
a pack rat

Qeynos Hills
NPC Name
a large field rat
a mangy rat
Scruffy

Steamfont Mountains
NPC Name
a giant diseased rat
a large plague rat
a large rat - Steamfont Mountains
a young plague rat
an infected rat

The Qeynos Aqueduct System
NPC Name
a large rat - The Qeynos Aqueduct System
a sewer rat - The Qeynos Aqueduct System

The Warrens
NPC Name
a frenzied rat

Thurgadin
NPC Name
a scuttle rat

West Freeport
NPC Name
a large rat - West Freeport

Quests

This item is used in quests.
Expansion List - Premium only.

North Kaladim
Quest Name
Stonewrath Axe

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Dagnor's Cauldron
North Qeynos
North Ro
Paineel
Steamfont Mountains
The Qeynos Aqueduct System
West Freeport

worth

# Feb 02 2006 at 1:00 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1719792988335
679 posts
Scalded Rat Skin sells for absolutely nothing to any vendor.... no bazaar price ... no trade... I have found these on practically every kind of rat in Norrath... the question is... will they all work for the quest or must you go to Dagnor's Cauldron??... I am not a berserker yet so will not be going to find out for a long time...
